field_values.action_summary: The party discovers a Warhoon incubator containing green Martian eggs. In an act of sabotage or defense, the incubator is destroyed, highlighting the high stakes of the Martian biological cycle.
field_values.camera_intent: Macro shots of green Martian eggs; Wide shots of the destruction event; Reaction shots of the group
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH014_SC002

## Production Intent
Establish the biological stakes of the Martian environment through the discovery and subsequent destruction of a Warhoon incubator. The sequence must transition from quiet tactical observation to sudden, violent chaos.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- tars_tarkas
- sarkoja
- dejah_thoris

## Required Environments
- martian_plains_and_march_route (specifically the incubator site)

## Continuity Constraints
- Incubator state transition (intact to destroyed)
- Debris pattern consistency post-destruction

## Beat List
- BT001: Discovery of the Warhoon incubator and green eggs.
- BT002: The destruction of the incubator via sabotage or defense.
- BT003: The group reacts to the loss/destruction.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
